2.4.6-headings-and-labels.remarks: Facet heading uses the configured label prop (e.g., 'Authors'). Search input labeled 'Search for values in the [label] facet'. Group labeled 'Values for the [label] facet'. All labels descriptive and localized.
Same pattern as atomic-facet. Heading describes the facet topic. Category buttons labeled 'Inclusion filter on [value]; N results'.
Facet heading descriptive. Min/max inputs labeled 'Enter a minimum/maximum numerical value for the [label] facet'. Apply button labeled 'Apply custom numerical values for the [label] facet'.
Facet heading descriptive. Date inputs labeled 'Enter a start/end date for the [label] facet'. Apply button labeled 'Apply custom start and end dates for the [label] facet'.
Facet heading 'Rating' is descriptive. Checkboxes labeled 'Inclusion filter on only N stars out of 5; N results'. Rating images have aria-label 'N stars out of 5'.
Same facet-header pattern. Color box buttons labeled 'Inclusion filter on [value]; N results'. Search input labeled 'Search for values in the [label] facet'.
Search input has descriptive aria-label explaining suggestions and submit behavior. Search button labeled 'Search'. Suggestions region labeled with keyboard instructions.
Section labeled 'Potential answer to your question'. Question heading uses the actual question text which describes the topic. Feedback radio group labeled 'Was this information useful?'.
Section labeled 'People also ask'. Each expandable question uses the question text as heading, which describes the content below.
Complementary landmark labeled 'Generated answer'. Content headings from AI response describe their topics. Feedback buttons labeled 'Helpful'/'Not helpful'/'Copy answer'.
Modal heading 'Sort & Filter' describes purpose. H2 headings 'Sort' and 'Filters' describe subsections. Sort combobox labeled 'Sort by'. Facets within modal use same descriptive pattern.
Combobox labeled 'Sort by' with visible label 'Sort by:'. Option labels describe sort criteria (e.g., 'Relevance', 'Most recent').
Navigation landmark labeled 'Pagination'. Radio buttons labeled 'Page N'. Previous/Next buttons descriptive.
Group and radiogroup both labeled 'Results per page'. Numeric radio values are meaningful in context of the group label.
Section heading 'Notifications' describes the content area.
Tablist aria-label is 'tab-area' which is a non-descriptive technical placeholder. Does not describe the topic or purpose of the tabs. See KIT-5805.
